name: Affective Computing Group
description: Pioneering research on emotion recognition, wearable biosensors, and digital mental health tools.
notes: Strong alignment with NOOS digital phenotyping and EMA capabilities.

name: Stanford Institute for Human-Centered AI (HAI)
description: Interdisciplinary AI research with healthcare applications including mental health screening.
notes: Potential for NOOS clinical AI validation partnerships.

name: IoPPN Computational Psychiatry
description: Leading European computational psychiatry lab focused on precision mental health and digital biomarkers.
notes: Key European partner for NOOS CE marking and clinical validation.

name: NIMH Computational Psychiatry Unit
description: Federal research unit developing computational models of psychiatric disorders and treatment response.
notes: Influences FDA/NIMH policy relevant to NOOS regulatory strategy.

name: SPRING Lab
description: Security & privacy engineering lab known for DP-3T (COVID contact tracing) and differential privacy.
last_publication: Practical federated learning with differential privacy (2025)
notes: Direct alignment with ÆLYA privacy-preserving architecture.

name: Privacy & Security Lab
description: Formal methods for security protocols, privacy by design, and cryptographic privacy.
notes: Formal methods expertise for ÆLYA protocol verification.

name: INRIA Privatics
description: French national lab focused on privacy-enhancing technologies and data protection.
notes: Key French partner for ÆLYA EU AI Act compliance.

name: OpenMined
description: Open-source community building privacy-preserving AI tools including PySyft and PyGrid.
notes: Active technical collaboration for ÆLYA federated learning stack.

name: Connection Science Lab
description: Research on data-driven society, personal data economics, and social physics.
notes: Foundational research for MYNε data marketplace architecture.

name: Oxford Internet Institute
description: Interdisciplinary research on the societal implications of the internet and data economy.
last_publication: Data governance frameworks for health data spaces (2025)
notes: EHDS policy expertise relevant to MYNε European deployment.

name: Data Science Lab
description: Research on distributed information systems, data management, and trust in data markets.
last_publication: Trust mechanisms for decentralized data markets (2025)
notes: Technical foundation for MYNε trust and reputation system.

name: Applied Cryptography Group
description: World-leading cryptography lab. Pioneered pairing-based cryptography, ZK proofs, and post-quantum research.
notes: Academic authority for BURHAN cryptographic protocol design.

name: Cryptography Lab
description: Foundational cryptography research including information-theoretic security and composable security.
notes: Formal security foundations for BURHAN audit trail.

name: Ethereum Foundation Research
description: Research arm of Ethereum developing scaling solutions, ZK rollups, and proof systems.
notes: Direct technical relevance for BURHAN L2 scaling and ZK infrastructure.

name: INRIA Cascade
description: French national cryptography lab specializing in public-key cryptography and post-quantum security.
notes: Key French academic partner for BURHAN post-quantum migration.

name: Stanford NLP Group
description: Pioneering NLP research lab. Key contributions to word embeddings, transformers, and knowledge-aware NLP.
notes: NLP foundations for YrKnown knowledge extraction pipeline.

name: Google DeepMind
description: Leading AI lab. Key contributions to reinforcement learning, protein folding, and language models.
notes: Frontier model capabilities relevant to YrKnown expert knowledge digitization.

name: Allen Institute for AI (AI2)
description: Non-profit AI lab behind Semantic Scholar, OLMo, and open knowledge tools.
last_publication: Open language models for knowledge tasks (2025)
notes: Semantic Scholar API and open models directly useful for YrKnown.

name: Meta FAIR
description: Fundamental AI research lab. LLaMA models, knowledge distillation, self-supervised learning.
notes: Open-source model ecosystem that YrKnown can leverage.

name: Berkeley AI Research (BAIR)
description: Broad AI lab covering multi-agent systems, robotics, NLP, and AI safety.
notes: MARL safety research relevant to RAQIB agent coordination.

name: CMU Robotics Institute
description: World's largest robotics department. Key contributions to autonomous agents and multi-robot systems.
notes: Multi-agent coordination algorithms for RAQIB territorial intelligence.

name: Microsoft AutoGen Team
description: Developers of AutoGen framework for LLM-based multi-agent conversation systems.
notes: Direct technical overlap with RAQIB LLM agent orchestration.

name: Palantir Technologies
description: Enterprise AI platform for geospatial analysis, intelligence fusion, and decision support.
notes: Competitive reference — RAQIB competes in territorial intelligence space.

name: Digital Currency Initiative
description: Research on cryptocurrency, CBDC design, and digital payment systems.
notes: Direct alignment with MIZAN CBDC integration strategy.

name: Center for Blockchain Research
description: Academic research on blockchain scalability, smart contracts, and decentralized finance.
notes: DeFi protocol research for MIZAN settlement layer.

name: BIS Innovation Hub
description: Central bank innovation lab developing CBDC prototypes and cross-border payment solutions.
notes: Institutional partner for MIZAN cross-border CBDC settlement.

name: ECB Digital Euro Project
description: EU central bank CBDC project developing the digital euro architecture and privacy framework.
notes: Regulatory framework MIZAN must integrate with for EU operations.

name: Inserm U1266
description: French psychiatry research unit focused on early detection, biomarkers, and precision psychiatry.
last_publication: Digital biomarkers for early psychosis detection (2025)
notes: Key French clinical partner for NOOS validation in francophone markets.

name: UM6P AI Lab
description: Moroccan AI lab with healthcare AI and NLP applications for Arabic and French.
last_publication: Multilingual NLP for mental health screening (2025)
notes: Strategic African partner for NOOS Arabic/French NLP capabilities.

name: Max Planck Institute for Innovation
description: Research on innovation economics, intellectual property, and data market regulation.
notes: EU data regulation expertise for MYNε compliance strategy.
